hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-gray-900 mt-10 mb-6
hierarchy.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl font-medium tracking-tight text-gray-900 mt-8 mb-4
hierarchy.h4: text-lg sm:text-xl font-medium text-gray-900 mt-6 mb-3
hierarchy.number_display: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tighter text-blue-600 font-mono

search_bar.style: w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:border-blue-500 focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-blue-500 focus-within:border-blue-500 transition-all duration-200 flex items-center overflow-hidden
search_bar.input: w-full h-14 pl-12 pr-4 text-lg bg-transparent border-none focus:ring-0 text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-400 outline-none

category_card.style: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl hover:border-blue-500 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 group cursor-pointer
category_card.icon: w-8 h-8 text-gray-500 group-hover:text-blue-600 mb-3 transition-colors

calculator_card.style: flex flex-col p-6 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl hover:border-blue-500 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer h-full
calculator_card.title: text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2 line-clamp-2

calculator_layout.form_section: lg:col-span-7 bg-white p-6 sm:p-8 rounded-2xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm
calculator_layout.results_section: lg:col-span-5 bg-gray-900 text-white p-6 sm:p-8 rounded-2xl sticky top-24 shadow-xl

form_elements.label: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2
form_elements.input: w-full h-12 px-4 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-gray-900 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 outline-none transition-shadow text-base
form_elements.input_suffix: absolute right-4 text-gray-500 text-sm font-medium pointer-events-none
form_elements.select: w-full h-12 pl-4 pr-10 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-gray-900 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 outline-none appearance-none cursor-pointer
form_elements.toggle_item: flex-1 text-center py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-md transition-colors data-[state=on]:bg-white data-[state=on]:text-gray-900 data-[state=on]:shadow-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 cursor-pointer

results_panel.main_result_value: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-semibold text-white font-mono tracking-tight break-words
results_panel.secondary_result: flex justify-between items-center py-3 border-t border-gray-700/50 text-sm
results_panel.action_button: mt-4 w-full py-3 bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-gray-900 outline-none

breadcrumbs.style: flex items-center text-sm text-gray-500 space-x-2 mb-8 overflow-x-auto whitespace-nowrap pb-2

ad_placeholder.style: w-full bg-gray-100 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 text-sm font-medium

seo_content.wrapper: prose prose-blue prose-lg max-w-none mt-16 text-gray-600
seo_content.faq_question: text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2 cursor-pointer flex justify-between items-center

layout_patterns.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-200 h-16 flex items-center
layout_patterns.grid_categories: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4 mt-8
layout_patterns.grid_calculators: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 mt-8

accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='calculator-form-submit')

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Astro + TS/JS project. Use native HTML/React elements with Tailwind, or Astro components as appropriate.
Do not use generic fonts like Inter or Roboto for headings. 'IBM Plex Sans' is specified for both heading and body to provide a technical, clean, readable look for numbers and long texts.
Design is practical and utilitarian (Swiss & High-Contrast). Avoid unnecessary gradients, purples, or heavy shadows. Focus on the tools.
The Home page should NOT have a massive hero image. It should immediately present the Search bar prominently, followed by the category grid.
Form inputs must be large (h-12), highly legible, and use native styling patterns for reliability on mobile.

The Calculator Results panel should be prominently styled, using a dark theme block (bg-gray-900) against the light page to draw focus to the numbers, simulating a physical 'LCD' screen or summary card.
Do not place ad placeholders above the calculator. Place them below the main tool or in a sidebar.
Ensure breadcrumbs are present on all nested pages.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL buttons, inputs, category cards, and links for testing.
